seo.site_title: TULIP – Unique Wedding Dresses in Hungary
seo.site_description: Hand-sewn, custom-made wedding and occasion dresses. Book an appointment today!
seo.og_description: Hand-sewn, custom-made wedding and occasion dresses.

home.skate_night_body1: 18 April 2026 – Style takes to the ice! Be part of the magic, where ice burns with passion and style dances gracefully with elegance.
home.skate_night_body2: SKATE NIGHT by TULIP is coming – an exclusive experience for lovers of style. Special outfits, welcome champagne, a fashion show, and an electrifying after party. One evening when Székesfehérvár becomes the beating capital of fashion. Bréda Bia, Newik and Gábor Beszeda will definitely be there.
home.skate_night_body3: You wouldn't want to miss it, would you?
home.support_event: I'd like to support the event
home.drawing_body: Discover the world of fashion design! Tulip Shop Hungary Kft. is holding a nationwide drawing competition for primary and secondary school students. Design your own ice princess dress – and it might even be featured at the SKATE NIGHT by TULIP fashion show!
home.arculat_tagline: Strength, harmony, uniqueness – drawn in four colours
home.arculat_caption: The dresses sketched on the model drawings will be presented at the finale.
home.arculat_closing: Together, this colour palette creates a visual world that is at once modern, energetic and refined — conveying exactly the feeling our brand stands for.

arculat_colors.black_desc: The foundation of our brand identity is black, a reliable anchor of clean lines and timeless elegance. Its confident presence gives a stable frame to our look and creates a visual base on which we build our brand.
arculat_colors.red_desc: This strong base is complemented by coral red, which brings freshness, energy and positive momentum. Its vibrant tone immediately captures attention, while giving our communication a friendly and direct character.
arculat_colors.fuchsia_desc: Fuchsia is the colour of creativity and uniqueness, appearing as a bold, vibrant accent in our brand identity. As a tool of modern self-expression, it adds playfulness and a strong visual personality to our look.
arculat_colors.bone_desc: Everything is balanced by the subtle, natural shade of bone white. Its soft tone provides a harmonious backdrop that elegantly highlights the stronger colours, creating a clean and refined overall impression.

contact.section_subheading: Have a question? Get in touch!
contact.page_intro1: If you have questions about the collections, are looking for a custom piece or a small run, or simply want to connect with the brand – feel free to write or call. We'd love to hear from you.
contact.page_intro2: TULIP is more than just a brand. It's a feeling. A journey. A story in which you are the main character.
contact.success: Thank you! We have received your message.

collection.page_description: Browse our unique wedding and occasion dresses
collection.heading: Collection
collection.tagline: The highest form of feminine elegance – not following the world, but leading it.
collection.body1: The Tulip Luxury Collection does not merely present garments – it creates iconic pieces. Every detail captures the essence of quiet elegance, luxury hidden in restraint, and undeniable craftsmanship. You enter a world where femininity is a status, quality is a value, and elegance is a legacy.
collection.body2: Each piece is an artistic composition: hand-drawn lines, clean forms, and delicately light textures. It does not follow trends – instead, it opens a new chapter in Hungary's high-prestige fashion industry.
collection.body3: The collection speaks to those who understand and feel true luxury, for whom quality is not optional but essential, who see quiet elegance as the strongest statement, and who can live the timeless beauty of femininity.

story.page_description: I am Nikolett Oszoli, the creator, founder and designer of the Tulip brand – a women's tailor, light-industry engineer, engineering teacher, designer and mother of two.
story.heading: My Story
story.intro_p1: I am Nikolett Oszoli – the creator, founder and designer of the Tulip brand. A women's tailor, light-industry engineer, engineering teacher, designer and mother of two, guided in my work by feminine elegance, the inspiring power of nature, and the timeless quality of hand-drawn designs.
story.intro_p2: Tulip was not born in a single moment – it is a story that matured over decades.
story.intro_p3: As a child I was already drawing tulip dresses for princesses. In primary school I won a prize with my story "Tulipánország". Later, the iconic building of my hometown – the Tulipánosház – became a defining inspiration. This enduring motif now not only symbolises but actively shapes the essence of my brand.
story.intro_quote: "For me, fashion is far more than designing clothes: it is a dialogue with ourselves, a tool for expressing female identity, and the natural way to show inner strength."
story.manifesto_p1: As a light-industry engineer, I bring innovation into fashion: I believe in modern technologies, the Industry 4.0 approach, zero-waste design and conscious material use. As a designer, I am guided by hand-drawn plans, fine details, uniqueness and the elegant expression of femininity.
story.manifesto_list_intro: Tulip pieces thus become at once:
story.manifesto_p2: My goal is for every woman to step into the world in a dress that makes her feel confident, balanced and true to herself.
story.manifesto_p3: For me, Tulip is not just a fashion brand – it is a statement of belief: to show that creation, the preservation of values and self-fulfilment can revive a declining industry.
story.manifesto_p4: Renewing Hungary's light industry is part of my calling. I believe that knowledge, innovation, a modern mindset and setting a positive example can restore dignity to this craft – and make it attractive to the next generation.
manifesto_items2: appreciate the subtle presence of uniqueness and luxury
are strong in character, refined in style
story.manifesto_p5: My dresses are designed to make this inner beauty and confidence visible in every moment.
story.manifesto_closing: This is what Tulip is about: the beauty of a woman's journey, the power of mindful creation, and the belief that creating value is a responsibility – but also a privilege.

partners.heading: Partners
partners.intro: The world of Tulip is supported by professionals and studios who share the same values as our brand: quality, reliability and excellent craftsmanship.
partners.cta_text: If you would like to join the Tulip world as a partner, feel free to write to us. We are open to new ideas, collaborations and creative projects.

skate_night.vision_quote: "For me, fashion is far more than designing clothes: a dialogue with ourselves, a tool for expressing female identity, and the natural way to show inner strength."

worlds.text: "A small wonder, endless brilliance. The diamond that does not just shine – it captivates."

skate_night.awaits_p1: Gift area, B2B sector, Marketing & Sponsor exhibition corridor, Textile exhibition of drawing competition entries and fashion industry stories, Fashion show in an exclusive and unconventional setting, an immersive experience with figure-skating models and a runway show set to Bréda Bia's music.
skate_night.awaits_p2: Exclusive ticket holders enjoy welcome champagne, a gala dinner on the ice in a decorative setting during the show, followed by an after party with Newik.

stars.name: Newik:
stars.desc: Setting the beat for the after party.

stars.name: Gábor Beszeda:
stars.desc: The elegant host of the evening.

skate_night.ticket_exclusive_desc: Premium attention: welcome champagne, gala dinner at round tables of 10 directly on the ice – only 50 seats available for the elite.
skate_night.charity_quote: "Because when style meets compassion, the light shining on the ice becomes a light of hope in someone's life."
skate_night.charity_text: A portion of ticket proceeds will be donated to the Alba Bástya Family and Child Welfare Centre and the ÁGOTA® Foundation.

drawing.page_title: Ice Princess Fashion Design Competition – Tulip
drawing.page_description: A nationwide drawing competition for students. Design your own ice princess dress – and your entry might be featured at the SKATE NIGHT fashion show!
drawing.heading: DESIGN COMPETITION
drawing.subtitle: Ice Princess Fashion Design Contest
drawing.discover: Discover the world of fashion design!
drawing.intro: For primary and secondary school students. Do you love fashion? Are you curious how a clothing collection comes to life? Are you inspired by design, creativity and self-expression? Tulip Shop Hungary Kft. is holding a nationwide drawing competition where you can show the world your own fashion creation!
drawing.aim_text: To bring young people closer to the fashion industry and design thinking, and to inspire them as the creative makers of the future.
drawing.prizes_p1: Places 1–3 will be awarded in each category.
drawing.prizes_p2: The winning entry will be made into a real garment and presented at the SKATE NIGHT by TULIP fashion show!
drawing.prizes_p3: In addition, every podium finisher receives a creative package and a book prize, as well as 2 complimentary tickets (1 student + 1 companion) to collect their award in person at the venue.
drawing.event_award_note: The award ceremony will take place after the fashion show finale.

timeline.desc: B2B / Marketing / Product showcase / Exhibitors / Shop / Entries – (Exhibition corridor)
Fashion Show II – Bréda Bia, Finale, Drawing Competition results

drawing.submit_text: Entries must be submitted digitally, as a scanned document.
drawing.notification_value: By 10 April 2026, by email to the address provided at registration.
drawing.consent_text: Entrants agree that their name, age, year group and school may appear on www.tulip.hu and on Tulip Shop Hungary Kft.'s social media channels.

blog.heading: Blog
blog.tagline: Fashion begins where the story is born.
blog.intro: Fashion is more than clothes – it is a thought, a feeling, a breath of self-expression. The Tulip blog was created to give you a glimpse into this process: how inspiration becomes a sketch, a sketch becomes fabric, and fabric becomes a piece that is in harmony with its wearer.
